title: Create Radar: Fire Arc Filter
description: Qol Addon for Create: Radars that adds fire arc controls for cannon networks no-fire sectors in yaw and pitch so weapons only engage when the bore is pointed where you allow.
body:
## Create Radar: Fire Arc Filter
Addon for Create: Radars that adds fire arc controls for cannon networks no-fire sectors in yaw and pitch so weapons only engage when the bore is pointed where you allow.

### Features
- Yaw & pitch dead zones on auto yaw/pitch controllers-angles where the weapon must not fire.
- Filter items to store or swap zone layouts (portable configs).

### Usage
1. Build your radar + weapon network as with base Create: Radars.
2. Configure dead zones on the yaw/pitch using filter items and apply via Rightclick, remove via Shift + Rightclick
3. Acquire targets on the monitor as usual. Auto-fire is only allowed when aim sits outside blocked arcs.
